sections.title: 1. RDX Session
sections.subtitle: Foundation Layer (Logging)
sections.content: Session logging and tracking across agents and projects. The immutable history of the build.
sections.fileStructure:
rdx-session/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ core/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ SessionManager.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ EntryLogger.ts
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ types/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ session.types.ts
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ entry.types.ts
integrationPoints: Receives session requests from all other systems
Provides session context to Lattice Sync for coordination
Exports logs for RIT/RitOps publication layer
Feeds historical data to Grindhouse for pattern analysis

sections.title: 2. Grindhouse
sections.subtitle: Execution Layer
sections.content: Strategic planning (Dropframe) and production execution (Grindline). The engine of the system.
sections.fileStructure:
grindhouse/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dropframe/ (Research & Analysis)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ FrameManager.ts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AnalysisEngine.ts
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ types/
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ frame.types.ts
в””в”Ђв”Ђ grindline/ (Production Execution)
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ TaskQueue.ts
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ExecutionEngine.ts
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ types/
        в””в”Ђв”Ђ task.types.ts
integrationPoints: Dropframe receives research triggers from VSM School (knowledge gaps)
Dropframe outputs feed Grindline task queue
Grindline coordinates with Lattice Sync for agent assignment
Both log all state changes to RDX Session
Completed tasks flow to Content Factor for processing

sections.title: 3. Content Factor
sections.subtitle: Pipeline Layer
sections.content: Modular content pipeline for creation, processing, and distribution.
sections.fileStructure:
content-factor/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pipeline/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ PipelineManager.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ StageProcessor.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ validators/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ stages/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ creation/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ refinement/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ distribution/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ types/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pipeline.types.ts
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ content.types.ts
integrationPoints: Receives completed tasks from Grindline as input artifacts
Uses Clearline7 for formatting in refinement stages
Coordinates with Lattice Sync for multi-agent review processes
Outputs to VSM School for educational content
Publishes final artifacts through RIT/RitOps
Logs all stage transitions to RDX Session

sections.title: 4. VSM School
sections.subtitle: Educational Output
sections.content: Systems thinking education with training cards and modular curriculum.
sections.fileStructure:
vsm-school/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ curriculum/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ModuleManager.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ CardGenerator.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProgressTracker.ts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cards/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ templates/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ validators/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ types/

в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ card.types.ts
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ progress.types.ts
integrationPoints: Triggers research in Dropframe when knowledge gaps identified
Receives educational content from Content Factor pipeline
Uses Clearline7 for card formatting and visual consistency
Coordinates with Lattice Sync for multi-learner contexts
Logs all progress and completion to RDX Session
Publishes completed modules through RIT/RitOps

sections.title: 5. Lattice Sync
sections.subtitle: Coordination Layer
sections.content: Multi-agent coordination, context sharing, and protocol management.
sections.fileStructure:
lattice-sync/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ coordination/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AgentRegistry.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ContextBroker.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProtocolManager.ts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ protocols/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ handoff.protocol.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ review.protocol.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ collaboration.protocol.ts
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ types/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ agent.types.ts
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ context.types.ts
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ protocol.types.ts
integrationPoints: Central coordination hub for all agent-to-agent communication
Provides shared context to Grindline for task assignment
Coordinates review protocols across Content Factor stages
Manages handoffs between Dropframe research and Grindline production
Enables multi-agent collaboration in VSM School learning contexts
Logs all coordination events to RDX Session
Receives agent availability updates from all systems

sections.title: 6. Clearline7
sections.subtitle: Formatting Layer
sections.content: Google Docs formatting infrastructure and style system.
sections.fileStructure:
clearline7/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ formatters/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DocumentFormatter.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ StyleEngine.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ TemplateRenderer.ts

integrationPoints: Used by Content Factor for formatting in refinement stages
Provides card formatting for VSM School modules
Formats all documentation output from Grindline
Ensures consistent styling across RIT/RitOps publications
Integrates with Google Docs API for collaborative editing
Logs formatting operations to RDX Session
Provides style definitions to all content-generating systems

sections.title: 7. RIT / RitOps
sections.subtitle: Publication Layer
sections.content: Public presentation layer for the Radiant Seven ecosystem.
sections.fileStructure:
rit-ops/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ publication/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ PublicationManager.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ VersionControl.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ DistributionEngine.ts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ presentation/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ SiteGenerator.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ComponentLibrary.ts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ analytics/

в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ distribution.types.ts
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ metrics.types.ts
integrationPoints: Receives final artifacts from Content Factor for publication
Uses Clearline7 for consistent web presentation styling
Pulls historical data from RDX Session for version tracking
Coordinates with Lattice Sync for multi-agent review before publish
Publishes VSM School modules as accessible web content
Logs all publication events and metrics to RDX Session
Provides public API endpoints for external integrations
